content: HA builder (home-assistant/builder) deprecated as of 2026.02.1. Replaced by three composable GitHub Actions: (1) prepare-multi-arch-matrix (takes JSON arch array, outputs build matrix), (2) build-image (single-arch Docker Buildx build with optional push+Cosign), (3) publish-multi-arch-manifest (combines amd64-image:tag + aarch64-image:tag into multi-arch manifest). Dockerfile uses ARG BUILD_FROM with default e.g. FROM ghcr.io/home-assistant/base-debian:bookworm. build.yaml (old legacy format) no longer used by new actions - put FROM directly in Dockerfile.
